title: Was any of the speculation of 20 right
display_title: Was any of the speculation of 20 right
wikitext:
[]: Was any of the speculation of 2.0 right?             Quote Post by chaosakita » Mon Nov 05, 2012 8:55 pm In light of 3.0 near release, I want to ask if any of the speculation given for 2.0 was right. I mean, I don't think anyone could've predicted the huge turn that 2.0 took, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:06 am Pretty much none of it. And then came all the "RUINED COMPLETELY FOREVER" reaction, which took a long while to subside.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:11 am Mr. Tines wrote: Pretty much none of it. And then came all the "RUINED COMPLETELY FOREVER" reaction, which took a long while to subside.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:21 am riffraff11235 wrote: I'm anticipating a similar cycle with 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:25 am bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: I think this depends on how dark it gets. a darker story would be welcomed.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:44 am riffraff11235 wrote: I'm anticipating a similar cycle with 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Nov 06, 2012 4:42 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Tue Nov 06, 2012 4:45 am This just confirms my thought that it's futile to try and guess at these things. The movie is coming out in less than a month, so we might as well just all hang tight.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Nov 06, 2012 10:48 am chaosakita wrote: This just confirms my thought that it's futile to try and guess at these things.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Nov 06, 2012 12:02 pm I think the only time any of the 2.0 (or 1.0) speculation was right was with the aid of the "Keywords" posters for either films. Since we didn't get one (yet? at all?) for 3.0, I doubt any will end up being right.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Nov 06, 2012 12:08 pm This is why I don't participate in speculation threads. If I wanted to be right in how a movie turned out, then I would feel the need to make it myself. I'm an Evangelion fan as a spectator, not as a creative participator. Making theories would deter from that and make my opinion of the film based on that which I though the movies should have been, not whether or not they accomplished what they wanted to be well. You Are (Not) Alone = Great Prelude You Can (Not) Advance = Great Advancement You Can (Not) Redo = I don't have an effing clue what to think of the Evangelion series anymore. Haven't had this feeling since watching NGE for the first time. It's kind of epic. FINAL = The End, I would imagine.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 06, 2012 12:19 pm There were lots of things that could be correctly guessed, based on 1.0's preview, the trailers, the key words poster, and the fact that NGE's plot line was still being partly followed. Of course, they were fairly pedestrian things like, "Eva-05 and 'Tunniel' fight", "Mari pilots Eva-05", "those giant legs and the clock face belong to the same Angel", and "the Moon Giant is Eva-06". We were thrown for a loop with stuff like Asuka piloting Eva-03, key word "Predation" referring to the Angel eating an Eva and not the other way around, and key word "Third Impact" actually meaning that Third Impact would be triggered.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Nov 06, 2012 12:51 pm Reichu wrote: ...key word "Predation" referring to the Angel eating an Eva and not the other way around, and key word "Third Impact" actually meaning that Third Impact would be triggered.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Nov 06, 2012 1:24 pm The 2.0 poster with the keywords dates to 2009.03.14. Film released 2009.06.27.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Sun Nov 11, 2012 7:22 pm Most speculation for 2.0 was incorrect because 1.0 followed the anime so closely. Nobody knew that 2.0 would have such a huge turn of events that went of the rails. But since we now know that only certain parts of the anime will be present and lots of original context will unfold, I think some bits of the 3.0 speculation are not incorrect. There are many interpretations of the Asuka space scene and the Hope/Love spot trade with kaworu/Rei which makes me believe at least some predictions will come true [Though be aware that most of it will probably be incorrect] ~~ At least its fun to speculate ~~

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:06 am Pretty much none of it.
